changeSet.author: claude-code
changeSet.comment:
Issue #137: Optimize FHIR Queries for Primary Care Dashboard
Add composite indexes optimized for batch patient queries: - Batch patient lookup by tenant and multiple IDs - Active patient filtering with deleted_at IS NULL - Dashboard query performance optimization
Expected performance improvement: - Batch patient query: 1.5s -> 500ms - Dashboard load time: 4-6s -> 2s
